impacts.description: Contribution to and implementation of the European Apply AI Strategy, advancing the adoption of next-generation AI agent capabilities in key economic sectors including healthcare, advanced manufacturing, and in-vehicle autonomous driving.
Wider deployment and industrial uptake of next-generation AI agent solutions across economic sectors via European Digital Innovation Hubs (EDIHs), enabling broader societal and economic benefit.

Open scientific advancement: dissemination and sharing of AI agent R&D results with the European research community through the AI-on-demand platform, strengthening European AI research infrastructure.
Strengthening European open strategic autonomy in digital and emerging enabling technologies through advances in next-generation AI agent capabilities.
impacts.inference_note: The topic is placed within the destination 'Achieving open strategic autonomy in digital and emerging enabling technologies (2026-27)'. Advances in next-generation AI agents directly serve EU strategic autonomy objectives in the digital domain. This impact is inferred from topic destination placement and not from an explicit impact statement within the topic scope or expected_outcome section.

impacts.description: Unlocking the economic potential of AI agents across diverse economic sectors, including data analytics and coding, by advancing agent architecture, memory, reasoning, and autonomous behaviour.
